/usr/bin/clang++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX14.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=14.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/colormenoisy.dir/colormenoisy_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/colormenoisy.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/colormenoisy.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o colormenoisy.app/Contents/MacOS/colormenoisy -F/Users/BCW1/Qt/6.9.2/macos/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/BCW1/Qt/6.9.2/macos/lib /Users/BCW1/Qt/6.9.2/macos/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /Users/BCW1/Qt/6.9.2/macos/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /Users/BCW1/Qt/6.9.2/macos/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
